title: Flow Trim! (Wild Trim Replacement)
description: This resource pack replaces the Wild Armor Trim with the Flow Armor Trim from Minecraft 1.21.1, bringing the newer design into older versions.
body: This resource pack updates the appearance of armor in older versions of Minecraft by replacing the standard Wild Armor Trim with the sleek and modern Flow Armor Trim introduced in Minecraft 1.21.1. It carefully replicates the new design, textures, and color patterns, allowing players to enjoy the latest visual style without needing to upgrade their game version. MAKE SURE TO EXTRACT IT THEN PUT IT IN UR RESOURCE PACK!
